current_phase.label: Public /chat route verified and product acceptance closeout

current_milestone.label: Unified-account entry, onboarding, homepage, and one real DeepSeek round-trip are live

progress_summary: This repo remains the deployment wrapper for the official LobeHub image on the local Mac, and the public `/chat` route is again serving after a Docker Desktop outage left `127.0.0.1:3210` without a listener. The immediate incident was caused by Docker daemon unavailability, not by a missing LobeChat LaunchAgent: `com.codex.lobechat.frontend` was still running but its previous script only waited for `docker info`, so it could not recover when Docker Desktop itself was stopped. Starting Docker Desktop restored the Compose stack and `https://hernando-zhao.cn/chat/` now reaches the live entry path instead of returning `connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:3210`. The wrapper watch is being hardened so the release LaunchAgent sets a LaunchAgent-safe Docker CLI `PATH`, starts Docker Desktop when the daemon is unavailable, and keeps the Compose/probe loop tied to `http://127.0.0.1:3210/`. The deploy profile now also targets the actual runtime checkout `~/codex/runtime/projects/lobechat`, restarts `com.codex.lobechat.frontend`, and includes the 3210 health check so future release publishes cannot skip the watched local route verification. Existing product decisions remain in force: `/chat` uses root-domain OIDC, LobeHub email/password login stays disabled, mounted-path custom image patches remain required, and DeepSeek remains the only provider that has been live-validated end to end.
blockers: Non-DeepSeek provider keys in `deploy/.env` remain placeholders, so Anthropic/OpenAI/Google model validation is still intentionally out of scope for this round.
The live app still emits low-priority asset noise such as missing `favicon-progress.ico` variants, but this does not block auth, onboarding, homepage delivery, or the validated DeepSeek chat path.
next_step: Publish the Docker-watch hardening into the canonical and runtime checkouts, restart `com.codex.lobechat.frontend`, then verify both `http://127.0.0.1:3210/` and `https://hernando-zhao.cn/chat/` from the served runtime.
